evidence.excerpt: PR #92 is MERGED with merge commit a4abd0f14cd7 at 2026-07-08T03:38:09Z, but current origin/main is ab006afb991d and gh compare reports a4abd0f...ab006afb as diverged; git branch -r --contains a4abd0f returns no current main branch.

The PR #92 merge commit adds cron-predefine.ts, cron-telemetry-source.ts, and snapshot-writer.ts, while current origin/main lacks all three files and has no InProcessCronTelemetrySource or predefineF167SnapshotForCron symbols.
task_run_ledger id 298383 shows eval-domain-daily/eval:a2a RUN_DELIVERED once at 2026-07-09T03:00:00.044Z; 2026-05-30 through 2026-07-09 are single-fire, making a 41-day streak.

The 2026-07-09 scheduled invocation did not include sourceRefs, no docs/harness-feedback/snapshots/2026-07-09-f167-a2a-snapshot.yaml existed before this eval-cat evidence write, and Node fetch to 127.0.0.1:3004 telemetry endpoints failed with TypeError: fetch failed.
dynamic_task_defs has zero id/template_id='harness-fit-digest' rows, and task_run_ledger has zero harness-fit-digest runs.

proposedAction.target: origin/main / PR #92 F167 Phase O path B implementation
proposedAction.rationale: Re-land the PR #92 implementation changes onto the current origin/main tip, or otherwise restore a main lineage that contains a4abd0f14cd7, then restart/pull the runtime so the next eval:a2a cron fire can produce prewritten sourceRefs with counter_window and grounding-phase-o data.

proposedAction.target: main sync / verdict auto-PR merge flow
proposedAction.rationale: The F167 implementation merge was not retained in current main after later verdict PR merges, matching the sync-clobber failure mode already under eval:task-outcome; add or route a guard so implementation commits cannot be silently removed from main lineage.
